# Insight Analyst happy-path test data

Use these files to exercise the workflow manually:

- `survey.csv` for the main three-turn survey flow.
- `transcript.json` for the transcript ingestion path.

Suggested turn 1 objective:

```text
Understand what blocks new users from completing onboarding in their first week.
```

The sample responses are intentionally short and mixed across onboarding,
billing, collaboration, and support so the workflow has enough signal to build
a draft codebook and then produce grounded insights after review.
